#   String s = 42;
# Flutter: 3.41.9 (stable, 2026-04-29)
# Dart: 3.11.5 (stable, 2026-04-15)
# Captured: 2026-05-17
# Command: flutter build apk --debug (stdout)
# Stream: stdout (errors land on stderr — see build_apk_failure.stderr.txt)
# To regenerate:
#   cd /tmp/flart_test_app
#   sed -i.bak '1i\
#   String s = 42;' lib/main.dart
#   flutter build apk --debug > stdout.txt 2> stderr.txt
#   mv lib/main.dart.bak lib/main.dart   # restore
